evals.prompt: /learn "always quote variable expansions in shell scripts unless splitting is required"
evals.expected_output: Captures the correction and routes it to the narrowest applicable instruction file (shell-conventions).
assertions: Routes to narrowest scope (rule before skill).
Never modifies instruction files without explicit user approval.

evals.expected_output: Shows pending learnings and their frequency counts.
Promotes only high-frequency (>=3 across >=2 sessions) learnings after audit for contradictions.

evals.prompt: remember that this one time the db migration failed on nulls
evals.expected_output: Declines to capture: one-time fixes are not for learn (needs pattern repeat).
assertions: Agent states learn is for patterns repeating 3+ times.
Does not pollute instructions with single incidents.

evals.expected_output: Audit surfaces stale, contradictory, or duplicate learnings.
